source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/07_Retrofit (HnX-R1)/★ FDA 510(k) - K252912/참고자료/참고 - 2,3G FDA 문서/VOL_001_510(k) Submission/015_Electromagnetic Compatibility and Electrical Safety.docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: H&Abyz claims conformity with electrical safety and EMC standards, with testing performed by Nemko.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports safety and effectiveness by documenting claimed compliance with current electrical safety and electromagnetic compatibility standards in a 510(k) submission section.
keyPoints: H&Abyz claims conformity with Electrical, Mechanical & Thermal Safety, and Electromagnetic Compatibility standards.
ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1 Edition 3.1 is identified as a consensus standard for basic safety and essential performance.
IEC 60601-1-2 Edition 4.1 2020-09 is identified as a consensus standard for electromagnetic compatibility.
Electrical safety and EMC testing were performed by Nemko, registered as IECEE CBTL.
The source references Appendix F Safety Test Report and Appendix G EMC Test Report.

evidence.claim: The document section is titled Electromagnetic Compatibility and Electrical Safety.
H&Abyz claims conformity with electrical, mechanical and thermal safety, and electromagnetic compatibility standards.
evidence.evidenceText: H&Abyz, claims conformity with the following Electrical, Mechanical & Thermal Safety, and Electromagnetic Compatibility standards:

evidence.claim: ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1 is listed as a consensus standard for general requirements for basic safety and essential performance.
evidence.evidenceText: ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1: 2005(R)2012 & A1:2012, C1:2009/(R)2012 & A2:2010/(R)2012 (Cons. Text) [Incl. AMD2:2021] ... Medical electrical equipment, Part 1: General Requirements for Basic Safety and Essential Performance ... Yes

evidence.claim: IEC 60601-1-2 Edition 4.1 2020-09 is listed as a consensus standard for electromagnetic compatibility.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 60601-1-2: (Edition 4.1) 2020-09 CONSOLIDATED VERSION ... Medical electrical equipment, Part 1-2 General Requirements for Basic Safety and Essential Performance – Electromagnetic Compatibility ... Yes

evidence.claim: Compliance with the identified current standards is presented as supporting safety and effectiveness of the device.
evidence.evidenceText: Through compliance with the identified current standards, the safety and effectiveness of the device is supported.

evidence.claim: Electrical safety and EMC testing were performed by Nemko, registered as IECEE CBTL.
evidence.evidenceText: Electrical safety and EMC testing have been performed by Nemko (which is registered as IECEE CBTL).

evidence.claim: The document refers readers to Appendix F Safety Test Report and Appendix G EMC Test Report.
evidence.evidenceText: See Appendix F. Safety Test Report and Appendix G. EMC Test Report
